sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sum_map(`id` UInt32, `keys` Array(UInt8), `values` Array(UInt8)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT sumMapFilteredWithOverflow([1, 2, 5])(keys, values) AS overflow_sum FROM test_sum_map;
UPDATE test_sum_map SET values = [250, 250, 250] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sumMapFilteredWithOverflow([4, 5, 6])(keys, values) AS overflow_sum_filtered FROM test_sum_map;
